comment: Reference documentation for terrain effect tags. Each effect maps to a registered handler in EffectRegistry.

effects.description: Provides light cover bonus (+1 to-hit for incoming fire)
Provides heavy cover bonus (+2 to-hit for incoming fire)
Marks this terrain as water; depth-dependent elevation and run restrictions apply
Entering water at this depth triggers a Piloting Skill Roll
Entering rough terrain triggers a Piloting Skill Roll
Entering sand triggers a Piloting Skill Roll
Entering heavy snow triggers a Piloting Skill Roll
Entering swamp triggers a Piloting Skill Roll
Surface is slippery; multiplies turn cost by 2
Turning while running on this surface risks a skid PSR
Unit may bog down when entering or remaining in this terrain
